sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> y, values, [0, 1, 0, 0, 1]) AS res FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_arrays SET values = arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> x - y, values, [1, 1, 1, 1, 1]) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, arrayReverseSplit((x, y) -> x + y, values, [1, 0, 1, 0, 1]) AS split_result FROM test_arrays;
